post.description: Run a synchronous structured-filter search and return matching rows with cursor pagination.
Get the top values by count for a single filter-search field.

Unified search query endpoint — accepts structured filters, LLM output, or search_id.

Replaces both /start-filter-search and /browse with a single endpoint.
Provide exactly one query source: simple_filters, filters, parsed_query, or search_id.
Use cursor alone for pagination continuation.

parameters.name: user_id

schema.description: Supabase user UUID forwarded by the WebApp proxy when the caller is org-API-key-authenticated but the request originates from a logged-in dashboard user. Used to set search_history.user_id so subsequent getSearchById/replay authorization checks succeed. Ignored when auth.user_uuid is already populated (JWT auth). Validated against auth.org_id before being trusted — a forwarded UUID from a different org is rejected 403 (prevents API-key holders from forging another org's user UUID into their search_history rows).
schema.title: User Id

parameters.description: Supabase user UUID forwarded by the WebApp proxy when the caller is org-API-key-authenticated but the request originates from a logged-in dashboard user. Used to set search_history.user_id so subsequent getSearchById/replay authorization checks succeed. Ignored when auth.user_uuid is already populated (JWT auth). Validated against auth.org_id before being trusted — a forwarded UUID from a different org is rejected 403 (prevents API-key holders from forging another org's user UUID into their search_history rows).

post.description:
Export search results as CSV asynchronously.

Starts a Temporal workflow that fetches results using parsed_query,
converts to CSV, and uploads to storage. Poll /search/status/{task_id}
for the resource_handle_id when complete.

delete.description: Remove a linked Slack account. Only the owner can unlink.

get.description:
Return metadata for the org's active signing secret, or null if none exists.

Never returns plaintext or raw bytes.

Args:
    auth: Injected auth context.

Returns:
    Optional[SigningSecretMetaResponse]: Metadata, or null.

schema.title: Response Get Signing Secret Webhooks Signing Secret Get

post.description:
Mint a new signing secret for the org.

The plaintext value is returned exactly once in this response.
After this call, only the preview (``sk_whsec_••••…<last4>``) is
ever shown again. There is no reveal endpoint.

Any existing active secret is revoked immediately before the new one
is inserted.  Use the ``/roll`` endpoint if you need an overlap window.

Args:
    auth: Injected auth context.

Returns:
    CreateSigningSecretResponse: Plaintext and metadata.

delete.description:
Revoke the active signing secret for the org.

After this call, webhooks are delivered unsigned until a new secret is
created.  This is intentional — we do not silently downgrade without
the customer taking an explicit action.

Args:
    auth: Injected auth context.

post.description:
Roll the signing secret with an optional overlap window.

During the overlap window both secrets are used for signing so
customers can deploy updated verification code without dropped events.

Pass ``expire_overlap_hours=0`` for an immediate roll — use this
if compromise is suspected.

Args:
    body: Roll request with ``expire_overlap_hours`` (default 24).
    auth: Injected auth context.

Returns:
    RollSigningSecretResponse: New plaintext and metadata.

WorkflowEdge.description: A directed edge connecting two blocks in a workflow graph.

edges.title: Edges
edges.description: Edges defining the execution order between blocks.

WorkflowGraph.title: WorkflowGraph
WorkflowGraph.description: A workflow expressed as a directed graph of blocks and edges.

overall_status.title: Overall Status
overall_status.description: Overall run status: queued, running, completed, or failed.

current_block.title: Current Block
current_block.description: Name of the block currently executing.

current_block_sequence.title: Current Block Sequence
current_block_sequence.description: Sequence number of the block currently executing.

total_blocks.title: Total Blocks
total_blocks.description: Total number of blocks in the workflow.

completed_blocks.title: Completed Blocks
completed_blocks.description: Number of blocks that have finished.

last_updated.title: Last Updated
last_updated.description: Timestamp of the last status update.

blocks.title: Blocks
blocks.description: Live status for each block in the run.

estimation_blocked_by.title: Estimation Blocked By
estimation_blocked_by.description: Block name preventing a full progress estimate, if any.

WorkflowLiveStatusResponse.title: WorkflowLiveStatusResponse
WorkflowLiveStatusResponse.description: Live status response for a single workflow run.

status.title: Status
status.description: Lifecycle status of the workflow definition (e.g. draft, ready).

step.title: Step
step.description: Current authoring step in the builder UI.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated.

last_run_date.title: Last Run Date
last_run_date.description: Timestamp of the most recent run.

workflow_definition.description: Workflow graph; included on detail responses.

row_count.title: Row Count
row_count.description: Number of rows in the file.

block_number.title: Block Number
block_number.description: Block sequence number that produced the file.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

message.title: Message
message.description: Error or status message, if any.

download_url.title: Download Url
download_url.description: Signed download URL; null if signing failed.

results.title: Results
results.description: Inline rows when the file is small enough to embed; otherwise null.

WorkflowResultItemWithDownload.title: WorkflowResultItemWithDownload
WorkflowResultItemWithDownload.description: Workflow result file with a signed download URL.

workflow_name.title: Workflow Name
workflow_name.description: Workflow name at the time of the run.

status.title: Status
status.description: Current status (e.g. queued, running, completed, failed).

step.title: Step
step.description: Current authoring step from the workflow.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated.

queued_at.title: Queued At
queued_at.description: Timestamp when the run was enqueued.

status_reason.title: Status Reason
status_reason.description: Short reason explaining the current status.

error_message.title: Error Message
error_message.description: Error message if the operation failed.

metrics.title: Metrics
metrics.description: Aggregate run metrics (rows in/out, costs, etc.).

blocks.title: Blocks
blocks.description: Per-block detail; usually null in list responses.

blocks_count.title: Blocks Count
blocks_count.description: Number of blocks in the workflow at run time.

WorkflowRunResponse.title: WorkflowRunResponse
WorkflowRunResponse.description: Response model for workflow run list items.

cache_config.title: Cache Config
cache_config.description: Cache configuration; only set by the custom-cache endpoint.

WorkflowRunStartedResponse.description: Response when a workflow run is started.
